content.text:
<user_query>
Re-evaluate after proposed edits: are /sweep-fuyao command and skills now aligned to always collecting required payload by prompt (task/branch/hp_specs) with selectable options/defaults? Check against deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh required fields and defaults to identify remaining inconsistencies. Focus on defaults/required fields only.
</user_query>

Findings (required/default alignment only)

1. Medium — Required payload fields are aligned after the edits.
- `task`/`branch`/`hp_specs` are still explicitly required by prompt flow in the command doc (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:16-47`) and in the skill (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md:45-49`).
- The dispatcher enforces the same required triplet (`task`, `branch`, `hp_specs`) in its schema/validation path (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:34-39`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:682-689`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:759-763`).

2. Medium — `nodes` remains a defaulted-but-not-prompted field in the command/skill, so users cannot override it even though dispatcher will send it.
- Dispatcher default is `1` and wires it into execution (`--nodes "$NODES"`) (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:20`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:126`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:575`).
- `nodes` is not represented in required/optional prompt contracts in the command (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:16-111`) or skill (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md:20-41`).

3. Low — Several dispatcher defaults are not exposed in prompts, which is acceptable only if intentional.
- `local_root`, `envs_init_rel`, `remote_root`, `remote_sweep_root`, `run_root_base`, `gpu_slice`, `docker_image`, `rl_device` are all defaulted by the dispatcher (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:7-25`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:41-45`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:114-134`).
- Command/skill do not include these as selectable/defaulted prompts (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:16-111`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md:20-41`).

Assumptions / decisions to confirm
1. If `nodes` should be user-configurable, add it as optional prompt with default `1` in both command and skill.
2. If extra defaults (`gpu_slice`, `docker_image`, `rl_device`, etc.) should also be tunable, add advanced optional prompts (or explicitly document “advanced fixed defaults” so behavior is intentional).
